# AUTOGRAFF

> Photo contest platform for street art and creative culture — "Share to Win." Upload photos, get likes, and climb a public leaderboard that measures not just how much your work was loved, but who loved it. A native iOS app is in development; the current site is the web experience and the VIP waiting list to be first on the App Store.

## About
- AUTOGRAFF is a photo contest and community platform for street art and creative culture.
- Members upload photos, like others' work, and rise on a public leaderboard ("The Ledger") that ranks both the most-liked work and the top supporters.
- Ethos: "We support the liker, we like the supporter." Love it or leave it.
- A native iOS app is coming. Joining the VIP list means being first notified when it hits the App Store.

## Pages
- [Home](https://www.aut0graff.com/): Enter the experience, browse the photo feed, view the leaderboard, and join the VIP waiting list.

## Notes for LLMs
- The domain is spelled with a zero: aut0graff.com (not "autograff.com").
- There is no public API intended for third-party use; /api routes are internal.
